text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aah, the sun's so bright... Just look at that clear,
blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's as if nature's sending me a sign that victory is
in store for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? You okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You look like you've been standing outside the
hotel room of your trainee, hopelessly yelling for
her to wake up.
choice_data_list: That's exactly what I've been doing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! My bad. But it's thanks to you that I'm
feeling so good!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Seeing my trainer before a race is part of my
routine. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Shall we then? Off to Kyoto Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The Derby was incredible! Special Week's energy
was so intense. She's the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is pretty tough, but only the best can
win the Kikuka Sho. Go get 'em, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't let you down! I'm gonna win this!
Wooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, lookie here, today's main act has arrived!
And who else would it be other than Spe herself?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: King? You look kinda tense...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Why wouldn't I be tense?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is the final crown we're racing for. I'll do
whatever it takes to make it mine!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gee, she's taking this pretty seriously. Well, I
guess that's the norm for her...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What do we have here? Are you by chance a fan
of mine?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not the smartest little cookie, are you? I suggest
you root for Spe, no questions asked. It isn't too
late to switch sides, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, that's...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is a hard race. That's why they say
only the very best Umamusume win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It only makes sense that you root for Spe! Don't
you think so?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess so...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ That's what I thought. Now go ahead and
focus on Spe now. That way...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I can do my thing and smash your expectations. ♪ Man, it's gonna feel so good!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! Uh, o-okay!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
With that done, my trap is laid. All that's left is to
run.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho... is mine.
